data.body: Investigation confirms fix already applied: DSO_COMMIT_WORKFLOW=1 sentinel present in COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md, single-agent-integrate.md, and per-worktree-review-commit.md. Guard in pre-bash-functions.sh lines 838-863 correctly allows sentinel-prefixed calls. Existing test test_pre_bash_dispatcher_record_test_status_commit_workflow_sentinel_allowed covers this. No code change needed.
